author: Aqua Cat
description: Helps move the selected element in a suggester up or down on mobile. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: pjkaufman
manifest.description: Helps move the selected element in a suggester up or down on mobile.
manifest.name: Mobile Suggestion Helper

name: Mobile Suggestion Helper

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Mobile Suggestion Helper v1.0.1

Updates the underlying logic to use `activeDocument` instead of `document` and also makes sure to attempt attestation of the `main.js` in the release workflow.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pjkaufman/obsidian-mobile-suggester-helper/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Mobile Suggestion Helper v1.0.0

Initial release with the ability to navigate up and down in a suggester list using commands as well as the ability to select an option from the suggester using another command.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pjkaufman/obsidian-mobile-suggester-helper/commits/1.0.0
